summary: Multi-language support testing completed successfully for ALL 7 languages (English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, German, Italian, Chinese). ALL page content sections translate properly: Hero, Trust Bar, Benefits Grid (6 cards), Outcomes (3 cards), Social Proof (4 items), Use Cases (4 cards), CTA, and Footer.
critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext.js contains complete translations for all 7 languages with 60+ translation keys for marketing sections
All marketing components (HeroSection, TrustBar, BenefitGrid, OutcomesSection, SocialProofSection, UseCasesSection, CTASection) correctly use useLanguage hook and t() function
Language selector dropdown shows all 7 languages with flags and native names
No raw translation keys visible on any page in any language
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language support fully verified for all 7 languages across all marketing page sections. Translation keys verified: heroTitle, heroSubtitle, startFreeTrial, seeHowItWorks, heroSupportingText, trustBuiltForEducators, trustAIIncluded, trustSecureEasy, trustReduceWorkload, benefitSectionTitle, benefitSectionSubtitle, benefitLessonPlanningTitle/Desc, benefitGradebookTitle/Desc, benefitAttendanceTitle/Desc, benefitAIToolsTitle/Desc, benefitPresentationsTitle/Desc, benefitWorkflowTitle/Desc, outcomeSectionTitle, outcomePlanFaster/Desc, outcomeStayOrganized/Desc, outcomeTeachConfidence/Desc, socialProofSectionTitle, socialProofEducators, socialProofSupport, socialProofWorkflows, socialProofSuitable, socialProofHelpCenter, useCaseSectionTitle, useCaseClassroomTitle/Desc, useCaseHomeschoolTitle/Desc, useCaseTutorsTitle/Desc, useCaseSchoolsTitle/Desc, landingCTATitle, landingCTASubtitle, footerProduct, footerResources, footerTrust, footerLegal, and all navigation items.
